section.heading: Effect of chapter on other laws

subsection.heading: Conformity with State and Federal law

content.p: All actions taken pursuant to this chapter pertaining to the diversion, storage, use, or transfer of water shall be in conformity with applicable State and applicable Federal law.

subsection.heading: Effect on jurisdiction, authority, and water rights

content.p: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as expanding or diminishing State, Federal, or tribal jurisdiction or authority over water resources development, control, or water rights.
